title: Valkyrien Ice Breakers
description: adds a block to allow Valkyrien Skies ships to break through ice
body: # Valkyrien Ice Breakers A very simple mod that adds 1 block (and its block entity) ![recipeReplace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8f47326f0ffefa3089bfd76f3e48347d542ce562.png) the block is crafted with 4 iron bars in the corners and an iron block in the centre it will destroy ice in a 3x3x3 area around it, and replace it with water
